lookalikes.prompt: A young woman in her late 20s or early 30s with sun-kissed olive skin and a few faint beauty marks, stands at a bustling bar, holding a whiskey glass. She has a Roman nose with a high bridge, and her lips are full and pillowy, hinting at a gentle smile. Her face is heart-shaped, with a softly pointed chin. Medium full-body shot, soft warm lighting. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
